name: Scroller
description: Horizontal scroll container with navigation controls
searchText: scroller horizontal scroll container with navigation controls @mantine/core /core/scroller children controlsize draggable edgegradientcolor endcontrolicon endcontrolprops scrollamount showendcontrol showstartcontrol startcontrolicon startcontrolprops

props.name: draggable
props.description: Determines whether content can be scrolled by dragging with mouse, true by default

props.name: edgeGradientColor
props.description: Background color for the gradient fade on controls, 'var(--mantine-color-body)' by default

props.name: endControlIcon
props.description: Icon component for the end control, AccordionChevron by default

props.name: endControlProps
props.description: Props passed to the end control button

props.name: scrollAmount
props.description: Amount of pixels to scroll when clicking the control buttons, 200 by default

props.name: showEndControl
props.description: Determines whether end control should always be visible regardless of scroll position, false by default

props.name: showStartControl
props.description: Determines whether start control should always be visible regardless of scroll position, false by default

props.name: startControlIcon
props.description: Icon component for the start control, AccordionChevron by default

props.name: startControlProps
props.description: Props passed to the start control button
